emails.subject_base: Additional deals to move to Bankruptcy Books - Phy Gas
emails.body: RE: Additional deals to move to Bankruptcy Books Phy Gas can you tell me why EH6453.2 is not on the list? We are moving EH6453.5, in the comments it says it is an unwind of leg 2. Counterparty is Boston Gas. Thanks. PL To: Diamond, Russell; Giron, Darron C.; Gossett, Jeffrey C.; Hall, Bob M; Hodge, Jeffrey T.; Love, Phillip M.; Palmer, B. Scott; Richardson, Stacey; Theriot, Kim S.

emails.subject: RE: Additional deals to move to Bankruptcy Books - Phy Gas
emails.subject_base: Additional deals to move to Bankruptcy Books - Phy Gas
emails.body: That deal should have already been moved. It was on Stacey Richardson's Master Cumulative list as having been submitted with the "Auto-termination" project she was working on. If it is still showing in the "Live" books, it should also be moved to the "Bankruptcy" side. Thank you!! Cyndie To: Balfour-Flanagan, Cyndie; Diamond, Russell; Giron, Darron C.; Gossett, Jeffrey C.; Hall, Bob M; Hodge, Jeffrey T.; Palmer, B. Scott; Richardson, Stacey; Theriot, Kim S.
